name: digigun.formats.hx
description: Strongly typed, cross-platform readers and writers for file and data formats.
releasenote: Initial 0.1.0 release with strongly typed readers/writers, mutable editing APIs, and built-in support for INI, TOML, CSV, .properties, .env, YAML, MessagePack, NDJSON, and HCL2 subsets.
